title: Religious Statistics - Most spriritual - Chritians vs Non Christians

transcript.text: Okay. Gallup poll, 2,000 Americans, 2003. So who's the most religious, Christians or

In God. And only 58% of non-Christians believe in God. Survival in the total is 90. Survival
Of the soul after death. 92% for Christian. Only 63% for non-Christian. Total is 84. And
90% for America. So I guess Americans and for the world. So I guess Americans in general
Believe in God. That would make America less religious, which goes against what I said before
That we were the religiousest. Whatever. Miracles. Christian, 93%. Non-Christian, 54%. Median,
84%. Heaven. Christian, 95%. Non-Christian, 44%. Median, 82%. Resurrection of Christ. Christian,
96%. Non-Christian, 26%. Median, 80%. The virgin birth. Christian, 93%. Non-Christian, 27%. Total,
77%. Hell. Christian, 82%. Non-Christian, 30%. Median, 69%. The devil. Christian, 82%. Non-Christian,
21%. Non-Christian, 26%. Total, 68%. Ghosts. Christian, 50%. Non-Christian, 48%. Total, 51%. Astrology.
Christian, 27%. Non-Christian, 35%. Total, 31%. Ooh, so the one thing that the non-Christians
Believe more is astrology is astrology at 35%. And the Christians just do not believe
In astrology a little over a quarter. So being Christian makes you believe in it less. I guess
Because they're taught that it's like the devil. Heathenistic religion. Damn Celts. Something
Like that. Median, 31%. Okay. Reincarnation, Christian, 21%. Non-Christian, 40%. So the Christians are
Really not into reincarnation. Just a little bit over a fifth. And in total, 27%. So, dingy,

In hell. They replaced reincarnation with hell. Eternal. Hell eternal. And heaven eternal.

Just, you know, atheists and stuff. It'd be better to be a Christian than to be an atheist.
Until, of course, you get down to astrology and reincarnation. But generally, yeah. Better
To be Christian. And there you go.
